chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 561 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.520/2024 (R/Surety) 13.03.2024 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for applicant/surety. Mr. Najamuddin Dharejo, Special Prosecutor NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Instant application has been filed by applicant Rehmatullah seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Zafarullah Jafri was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.5,00,000/- vide order dated 03.04.2019. The applicant stood surety on his behalf by submitting original solvency certificate No.23 issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Garhi Yaseen. Thereafter, vide order dated 09.03.2021, bail application of applicant was dismissed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail has been recalled. In view of above, and the no objection for grant of this application extended by learned Special Prosecutor NAB, listed application is allowed. Office to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
